arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sends warning Chido Obi as Alejandro Garnacho Man United claim made amid transfer links

arts.ttl: Pundit says Manchester United player in “very sad situation” – Becoming very difficult to select
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen finds himself in a “very sad situation” at Manchester United, with it becoming very difficult to select him for the Danish national team. That’s according to Thomas Gravesen, via Ekstra Bladet, who laments Eriksen’s situation at Manchester United today and how it may be bringing his international career to an end. arts.ttl: Man Utd under 'pressure' & must sell to buy in summer - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says the club will have to sell players if they are to buy anyone in the summer.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville insists Manchester United could re-sign player they sold 'too quick'
arts.sum: Manchester United's striker issues will need to be address during the summer transfer window after deciding not to sign reinforcements in January

arts.ttl: “Absolutely rubbish” – Gary Neville makes big claim about player who’d be “perfect” for Man United
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Gary Neville has insisted Danny Welbeck has long been the kind of player who’d be perfect for the Red Devils. Welbeck put in another fine performance for Brighton last night in their 3-0 win over Chelsea, and Neville is clearly still a really big fan of the former Man Utd striker. arts.ttl: Amorim on Man Utd challenge: It's a fight every day – that can be exhausting
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says he feels like he is in a fight every day to turn Man Utd’s fortunes around – and admitted the most difficult part is to face up to the club’s fans amid their poor form.

arts.ttl: Scott McTominay forces Ruben Amorim into candid Man Utd admission – 'We don't have that here'
arts.sum: It's clear Amorim is missing a presence like McTominay in his Old Trafford engine room
